reviews.review_text: Considero que es caro para lo que ofrecen

Very lovely lady that runs the caravan park.
Will stay there again

Great place, well priced and the two sisters are fantastic and friendly and accommodating

We are heading back there again this year
I am dirver .... form warkar
The ladies running the place were really pleasant but the road noise for the time we were there was terrible. Would not recommend
Thanks for your hospitality

We tried to call the bigger parks all afternoon to see if we could get our motorhome and car trailer into a powered site. No one would answer the phone or call back.

Eventually I found this little gem. Deb answered the phone to our relief and within 10 mins we were tucking ourselves into a beaut spot.

Amenities were clean, grounds were tidy and lovely staff.  Rates were also good.

Ignore the big boys and stay here. Very quiet and relaxing after a long day on the road. We would definitely come here again.
Small c.park close to shopping& city. Old school management with gr8 service.
Thank you very much Debbie for te great assistance and care you provided to me on my stay.

Just one thing- absolutly grear! As already from the start Deb (the owner) was very friendly and relaxed to find a perfect side for us to stay. The facilities are great with a good kitchen (even a oven& smoothiemaker), clean bathrooms and a good laundry area.
We felt very safe in the caravan park. There are many permanent camper but all super friendly and helpful - we wanted to fix something at our and immediately everyone was there! :D
There is a very good deal for backpackers - 200$ for 7 nights for an umpowered tentside and the location is perfect with a lot of stores (woolworths, bunnings etc) around. You need approx. 5 min drive into the City :)

As we had to leave earlier Deb was very easy going& flexible with take a note with remaining days when we come back!

Thank you for the good time and hope you have one there as well! :D
Good for a stopoff. Located close to town.

The photos on the website show a beautiful landscaped caravan park however, it didn’t show the 4 out of order toilets,, dilapidated infrastructure.and the ‘stuck in the 70’s look. It doesn’t tell you it’s in an industrial area, noise of the factory nearby in the late evening and early hours and the constant road traffic of trucks in an out of the surrounding area.
Friendly staff clean amenities we had a great stay thanks guys
Really clean park and very friendly Deb on Reception
Camp there for a night $28. Good enough.
Nice clean cabins quiet  park would recommend as I will be staying there next time I am in Shepperton

Central and very close to most everything; shopping centres, supermarkets, big green shed, camping stores, city centre, etc. Deborah and Kerry the managers are very kind and helpful. They were there to guide us to our site and answer all of our questions and provide information. Amenities are very clean. Plenty of showers, toilets, and hot water. The free WiFi worked well too. Other residents of the park are respectful and friendly. We stayed for one week. Our first time to Shepparton. We really enjoyed our time there, and we look forward to visiting Strayleaves again in the near future.

I stayed  at this wonderful  place with my brother  and sister  in law as they were visiting  from Tasmania  even though  I live in Shepparton  I really  highly  recommend  this place I would be more than happy  Ti live permanently  in this caravan park very  clean rooms were amazing  and the people  who run it were just so kind and helpful
Nice quiet park with respectful residents. Ammenities are clean and well maintained.
Lovely staff Debbie was friendly and helpful. Park was quite and ammenities were clean a bit old but clean.

OMG, this caravan park is great.
Debbie and Kerry are such a pleasure. If you need anything, they go above and beyond to help and make your stay PERFECT 👌
All the amenities are clean and cleaned everyday.
Loved staying at Strayleaves

뜨거운 물도 잘 나오고 직원도 너무 친절해요🩷
Debby 감사해요! 좋은 하루 보내고 갑니다.

Debbbi makes you feel right at home. Very helpful and I lover her so much. highly recommended🥰 will come again into this place and can’t wait to see you debbi ❤️

From: Sarah & Husband

The strayleaves caravan park is a loverly caravan park to stay .
Debbie and Kerry who run the caravan park are very loverly and nothing is to much trouble ,  and they  go out of there way for you to make your stay a enjoyable and comfortable one. There very friendly and always love to have a chat even though they are always busy .
I recommend the strayleaves caravan park to anyone looking for a place to stay in Shepparton.
The caravan park is clean and well kept and the showers are hot which is great and are kept extremely clean.
My husband and I look forward to staying here again .
Thank you Debbie and Kerry.
Linda , Neil.

Nice quite park. Deb makes you feel at home. Very helpful. Amenities are old but  kept extremely clean. Well done ladies 🙂
Thanks again
Ross and Wendy
Camping facilities amazing
Great little caravan Park very quiet and friendly

We recommend this family caravan park 100%. The showers and toilets were very clean. Deb and her sister were very welcoming and kindly. Thank you for this stay :)
Oscar, Morgan, Martin & Teddy
Stayed at strayleaves, the staff were super friendly and helpful. I also talked to  the locals who I also found to be really friendly. The cabin we stayed in was clean and comfortable.
Great Park 👍

I highly recommend Strayleaves to anyone who is coming out to Shepparton, all staff were amazing and made us feel comfortable.  A special thanks to Deb you are amazing, we are so happy to have met you and can’t wait to see you next year when we head back to the next soccer tournament. Every Cabin that our teams had were so clean.

Thanks from the Sam, Joe and the Red Sea family.

Good little caravan park. The powered sites are large enough to fit a caravan, annex and car side by side.  Toilets and showers were very clean and the water for the showers were very hot.
Deb was very accommodating, we were up in Shepparton for a tournament and she was nice to let us leave our camper at the park on check out day to pick it up later.
There was a bit of noise from road traffic but not too bad. Only noticed when trying to sleep.   Priced very well and would recommend to people who are wanting a quiet little stop over spot.

Camp kitchen old and grubby.
Permanent residences looked like hovels.
Grass very long
Didn't feel very safe at all.
Great place. Will go back
Cabin was clean and well equipped. Management staff very friendly and helpful. Would stay again.
I'm travelling. I needed a neighbourly place (friendly, quiet, clean, economical, safe) to stay overnight. This is the place. Beautiful hot showers as well 👍🏻💯🙂
